description:
🚀 Build agentic systems that run your business: https://skool.com/scrapes 
Don't miss the next build - https://www.youtube.com/@simonscrapes?sub_confirmation=1

Most people are building Claude systems that will be redundant in 3 months. They're focusing on dashboards and features that Anthropic will solve for them. But there's one thing Anthropic will never solve: building the exact systems your business needs. In this video, I'll show you what's actually worth your time: the architecture underneath a true Agentic OS, how to structure reusable skills, and the mistakes to avoid. By the end, you'll have a complete pattern to build powerful, future-proof Claude workflows.

Chapters:
00:00 - The OS Architecture That Matters
01:17 - What Anthropic Will & Won't Solve For You
04:08 - The Mistake Everyone Makes With Skills
06:36 - The Skill System: The Correct Architecture

#claudecode #claudecodetutorial #claudeskills

chapters.title: What Anthropic Will & Won't Solve For You
The Mistake Everyone Makes With Skills
The Skill System: The Correct Architecture
